fields.TargetUser: The user we are doing full body tracking for.
fields.UseSymmetryForTrackers: Whether changes to sided points (left versus right) mirror onto the other side for the User Calibration Reference.
fields.UseSymmetryForAvatar: Whether changes to sided points (left versus right) mirror onto the other side for the Avatar Calibration.
fields.ShowBodyOverlay: Whether to show the User Calibration Reference.
fields.ShowAvatarOverlay: Whether to show the avatar reference.
fields.AvatarHeightCompensation: How much to multiply the avatar size relative to the User Calibration Reference.
fields._calibratingPose: Whether we are Calibrating the pose or not.
fields._spaceOffset: How much to offset play space.
fields._grabbable: The grabbable Component of the base plate.
fields._headReference: The reference visual for the head.
fields._leftHandReference: The reference visual for the left hand.
fields._rightHandReference: The reference visual for the right hand.
fields._hipsSource: The source of the hips data.
fields._chestSource: The source of the chest data.
fields._leftFootSource: The source of the left foot data.
fields._rightFootSource: The source of the right foot data.
fields._leftElbowSource: The source of the left elbow data.
fields._rightElbowSource: The source of the right elbow data.
fields._leftKneeSource: The source of the left knee data.
fields._rightKneeSource: The source of the right knee data.
fields._dialog: The dialog used to control this full body Calibration interface.
fields._platformBody: The reference on the platform visual.
fields._userBody: The reference on the user in world space.
fields._customAvatar: The custom avatar reference on the platform visual.
fields._leftHandOverride: The override slot of the left hand.
fields._rightHandOverride: The override slot of the right hand.
fields._targetCustomAvatar: The custom avatar to edit when calibrating the avatar.
fields._avatarHipsOffset: The "Target" slot of the avatar hips.
fields._avatarLeftFootOffset: The "Target" slot of the avatar left foot.
fields._avatarRightFootOffset: The "Target" slot of the avatar right foot.
fields._avatarLeftKneeDefaultOffset: The "Target" slot of the avatar left knee.
fields._avatarRightKneeDefaultOffset: The "Target" slot of the avatar right knee.
fields._avatarHipHandle: The handle object being used to adjust the avatar's hips.
fields._avatarLeftFootHandle: The handle object being used to adjust the avatar's left foot.
fields._avatarRightFootHandle: The handle object being used to adjust the avatar's right foot.
fields._avatarLeftKneeHandle: The handle object being used to adjust the avatar's left knee.
fields._avatarRightKneeHandle: The handle object being used to adjust the avatar's right knee.
fields._avatarLeftKneeOffset: The field to hook and change for the left knee offset.
fields._avatarRightKneeOffset: The field to hook and change for the right knee offset.
fields._platformBodyMaterialSets: The set of material switchers used to change the platform Body look.
fields._trackers: A list of trackers registered to the calibrating user.
fields._visualizationRoot: The slot used to store the visuals on the Calibrator platform.
fields._bodyNodeMaterial: The material being used for the visual of the User Calibration Reference.
fields._calibrationReferenceMaterial: The material being used for the visual of the User Calibration Reference.
fields._leftHandOverrideMaterial: The override material for the left hand visual.
fields._rightHandOverrideMaterial: The override material for the right hand visual.
fields._leftHandOverrideFrontColor: the color field for the front color of ``_leftHandOverrideMaterial``
fields._leftHandOverrideBehindColor: the color field for the behind color of ``_leftHandOverrideMaterial``
fields._rightHandOverrideFrontColor: the color field for the front color of ``_rightHandOverrideMaterial``
fields._rightHandOverrideBehindColor: the color field for the behind color of ``_rightHandOverrideMaterial``
fields._patternTex: The pattern texture used for the holographic visual for the User Calibration Reference.
fields._title: The title visual of the calibrator pedestal.

methods.OnRotateLeft: Handles when the user presses the rotate left button on the platform.
methods.OnRotateRight: Handles when the user presses the rotate right button on the platform.
methods.OnGrabbableToggle: Handles when the user presses the grabbable toggle button on the platform.
